message:
Refactor hook toolchain module to use shared ToolchainInfo type

Consolidates toolchain type definitions by using the canonical
ToolchainInfo from rch-common, eliminating code duplication and
ensuring consistency across the crate ecosystem.

Changes:
- Removed local ToolchainInfo struct (was duplicated from rch-common)
- Removed local rustup_toolchain() method implementation
- Import ToolchainInfo from rch_common instead
- Retained detection logic (parse_toolchain_file, detect_from_rustc)

Benefits:
- Single source of truth for ToolchainInfo type definition
- Serialization format consistent across rch, rchd, and rch-wkr
- rustup_toolchain() implementation shared via wrap_command_with_toolchain
- Reduces maintenance burden for toolchain-related changes

The toolchain detection logic (reading rust-toolchain.toml, legacy
rust-toolchain files, and falling back to rustc --version) remains
in the rch crate as it requires filesystem access to the local
project being compiled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
